name: Newcore Gold Ltd.
description: Newcore Gold Ltd. is a junior gold developer focused on the 100%-owned Enchi Gold Project in southwest Ghana, a 248 km² land package on the prolific Bibiani Shear Zone hosting approximately 1.72 million ounces of gold in Indicated and Inferred resources. The company is advancing development of Enchi with ongoing exploration drilling and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
